Headline: Yellow and Purple Line Service Temporarily Suspended
ShortDescription: Service on the Yellow and Purple Line has been temporarily suspended due to track conditions near Howard.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Service on the Yellow and Purple Line has been temporarily suspended due to track conditions near Howard.

Shuttle buses are available for Purple Line riders from Howard to Linden to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Yellow Line riders: #97 Skokie buses

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

We are working to restore service as soon as possible. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Pink Line Service Delayed near 54th/Cermak
ShortDescription: Pink Line trains are standing near 54th/Cermak due to signal problems.  Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Pink Line trains are standing near 54th/Cermak due to signal problems. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
